title: Herod the Great
writer: Damiano Damiani, Tullio Pinelli, Federico Zardi
actors: Edmund Purdom, Sylvia Lopez, Massimo Girotti
plot: Herod, King of Judea, is made a prisoner by the Romans. Convinced the King is dead, his faithful lieutenant, Aaron, is nevertheless unable to keep his promise to kill the Queen if something untoward happened to the King. He leads ...
